calendar.matters:
MOTION To Set Aside Dismissal Or Notice Of Settlement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION To Set Aside Dismissal and/Or Notice Of Settlement And to Enter Judgment (CCP 664.6).

Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's motion to set aside dismissal and enter judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The dismissal entered on June 14, 2013 is set aside and judgment is entered in favor of State Farm and against defendant Carmen Cannan in the amount of $3,573.78.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR# 6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
